tools.name: get_route_quote
tools.description: Use this when a human or agent wants the best non-custodial way to move value between fiat and crypto (or crypto to crypto). Returns ranked rails with fees, ETA, KYC burden, limits, and reasoning.

tools.name: create_swap
tools.description: Use this to swap any token on any chain into USDC on Base via Relay. Returns a headless deposit address (no signing) or an on-chain intent. App fees accrue on swaps.

tools.name: check_swap
tools.description: Use this to check a Relay swap's status by requestId and confirm app-fee collection (appFees vs paidAppFees).

tools.name: create_onramp_session
tools.description: Use this when a US user wants to buy USDC on Base with a card / Apple Pay / Google Pay. Returns a payment link a HUMAN must physically tap (fiat legs cannot be programmatically triggered); a human is notified. US-only guest checkout, <= $500/week.

tools.name: provision_wallet
tools.description: Use this to create a gasless, non-custodial CDP Embedded Wallet address on Base (TEE keys, user-exportable) to receive routed value.
